name: rag-web-browser
title: RAG Web Browser
description: Clean web browser and search scraper that generates token-optimized markdown for RAG pipelines and LLMs natively in Bxc.

query.description: Enter Google Search keywords or a URL of a specific web page.

urls.description: Specific URLs to crawl directly (Bxc extension).

maxResults.description: The maximum number of organic search results to extract.

outputFormats.description: Select one or more formats to which the target web pages will be extracted and saved.

scrapingTool.description: Scraping tool: browser-playwright (Chrome headless) or raw-http (curl-impersonate + cheerio).

removeElementsCssSelector.description: A CSS selector matching HTML elements that will be removed from the DOM before formatting.
removeElementsCssSelector.default: nav, footer, script, style, noscript, svg, img[src^='data:'], [role="alert"], [role="banner"], [role="dialog"], [role="alertdialog"], [role="region"][aria-label*="skip" i], [aria-modal="true"]

removeElements.description: Remove elements CSS selector fallback (Bxc extension).

htmlTransformer.description: Transform HTML using Mozilla's Readability helper: 'none' or 'readableText'.

desiredConcurrency.description: The desired number of web browsers running in parallel.

maxRequestRetries.description: The maximum number of times the actor will retry loading the target web page on error.

dynamicContentWaitSecs.description: The maximum time in seconds to wait for dynamic page content to load.

removeCookieWarnings.description: Attempt to close or remove cookie consent dialogs.

debugMode.description: Include debugging and latency statistics in the output.

requestTimeoutSecs.description: The maximum time in seconds available for the entire request.
